zh.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne於1415年出生。她和Sir Thomas FitzAlan至少有1個女兒。她去世於1480年享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne于1415年出生。她和Sir Thomas FitzAlan至少有1个女儿。她去世于1480年享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: nickname from Old French moine, Anglo-Norman French muine, moingne ‘monk’. Some of the following early bearers without the definite article could alternatively belong with (2).

variants.name: Moin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Moyne, a nickname from Old French moine, Anglo-Norman French muine, moingne ‘monk’.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Moynan
meanings: Irish: perhaps a diminutive of   Moyne   or a reduced form of   Moynihan  .

variants.name: Moine
meanings: French: from moine ‘monk’, probably applied as an occupational name for a servant at a monastery or an ironic nickname for someone of monkish behavior or appearance. Compare Lemoine .

variants.name: Moynes
meanings: English: variant of Moyne with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne was born in 1415. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Thomas FitzAlan. She died in 1480, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne est née en 1415. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Thomas FitzAlan. Elle est décédée en 1480, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne wurde 1415 geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas FitzAlan mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne è nata il nel 1415. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir Thomas FitzAlan. Morì nel 1480, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Moyneは1415年に生まれた。彼女はSir Thomas FitzAlanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1480年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne(은)는 1415년 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas FitzAlan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne nasceu em 1415. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir Thomas FitzAlan. Ela faleceu em 1480, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne родилась в 1415 г. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Thomas FitzAlan. Она умерла в 1480 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Moyne nació en 1415. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir Thomas FitzAlan. Murió en 1480, a la edad de 65 años.
